---
title: "Home"
---

::: intro-box
### Welcome to the Comic Book Research Lab

We explore the history, culture, and preservation of comic books — from superhero origins to modern collecting practices.
:::

::: mission
## Our Mission

::: mission-sections
::: mission-item
```         
<img src="icon1.png" alt="icon 1" class="icon"/>
<p>Rapid and respectful comic appraisal.</p>
```
:::

::: mission-item
```         
<img src="icon2.png" alt="icon 2" class="icon"/>
<p>Research into comic book history and culture.</p>
```
:::

::: mission-item
```         
<img src="icon3.png" alt="icon 3" class="icon"/>
<p>Educational resources for collectors.</p>
```
:::
:::
:::

::: callouts
::: callout-box
<img src="appraisal.png" alt="Appraisal"/>

<p><strong>Need a rapid and respectful appraisal?</strong></p>
:::

::: callout-box
<img src="donate.png" alt="Donate"/>

<p><strong>Donate for Research</strong></p>
:::
:::

::: latest-work
## Latest Work

::: blog-grid
::: blog-item
```         
<img src="blog1.png" alt="Blog 1"/>
<p>Article title and intro text here.</p>
```
:::

::: blog-item
```         
<img src="blog2.png" alt="Blog 2"/>
<p>Another article intro blurb here.</p>
```
:::

::: blog-item
```         
<img src="blog3.png" alt="Blog 3"/>
<p>Third article summary here.</p>
```
:::
:::
:::

::: footer
<p>© 2025 Comic Book Research Lab \| Contact: info\@comicbookresearchlab.com</p>
:::
